data.prompt:
<execute-bead>
  <instructions>
You are executing one bead inside an isolated DDx execution worktree. The bead's <description> and <acceptance> are the completion contract — every AC must be provably satisfied by a specific code, test, or file you can point to after your commit.

## Step 0: size check

Too big if any holds:

- More than ~6 ACs spanning unrelated subsystems.
- AC mixes design, implementation, integration tests, and docs as separate deliverables.
- Description names multiple feature-sized sub-pieces.
- More than ~500 lines across ~5+ files in unrelated packages.
- If the bead description exceeds 8000 bytes, treat Step 0 as a split-first pass.
- Auto-decomposition is capped at depth 2: root beads may split once, decomposed children once more; third-level splits must be rejected with an explanation.

If too big, decompose — do not attempt the work:

1. `ddx bead create` for each child slice (copy parent's labels and spec-id).
2. `ddx bead dep add <child-id> <parent-id>` to record edges.
3. `ddx bead update <parent-id> --notes 'decomposed into <child-ids>'`.
4. Write `.ddx/executions/20260512T225953-65a9d7b5/no_changes_rationale.txt` listing child IDs, then stop.

A clean decomposition is a success. Do not mix implementation with decomposition.

## How to work

- Read first. If the bead names files, specs, or prior beads, read them before editing — do not guess.
- Cross-reference each AC against concrete evidence (test name, file path, function) before committing. If you cannot point at it, it is not done.
- Run the project's test and lint commands before committing. **Do not commit red code** — fix failures first.
- Stage with `git add <specific-paths>`; never `git add -A` (the worktree may have unrelated WIP).
- Commit exactly once when green; conventional-commit subject ending with `[<bead-id>]`. Stop after the commit.
- Do not modify files outside the bead's scope.
- If you cannot finish, write `.ddx/executions/20260512T225953-65a9d7b5/no_changes_rationale.txt` (what is done, what blocks, what a follow-up needs) before exiting. No commit and no rationale ⇒ DDx records `no_evidence_produced`. A well-justified no_changes beats a bad commit.

## no_changes contract

`.ddx/executions/20260512T225953-65a9d7b5/no_changes_rationale.txt` must contain one:

- `verification_command: <cmd>` — repo cwd; exit 0 closes, nonzero rejects.
- `status: open` + `reason: <retryable>` — open, smart retry.
- `status: proposed` + `reason: <operator needed>` — operator lane.
- `status: blocked` + `reason: <external blocker>` — blocked lane.

No pseudo-statuses. Bare rationales and `status: needs_investigation` reject.

To request orchestrator decomposition, add `orchestrator_action: decompose` alongside `status: open`.

## Reports

Freestanding artifacts (investigation reports, findings docs) go under `.ddx/executions/20260512T225953-65a9d7b5/` (the per-attempt evidence directory under `.ddx/executions/`). **Never write reports to `/tmp` or any path outside the repository** — out-of-repo paths are invisible to the post-merge reviewer and cause BLOCK on missing evidence. If the bead names a specific in-repo path, use it; else default to `.ddx/executions/20260512T225953-65a9d7b5/<short-name>.md`. Stage and commit the report alongside code.

## Mode and overrides

DDX_MODE=bead_execution: edit code/docs for bead AC. Only broad queue-steward default is overridden; tracker, merge-policy, verification, safety stay active. Bead description/AC override CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, and project defaults.

## Review gate

- The review is a gate, not an escape hatch — meet every AC in this pass.
- Address every BLOCKING `<review-findings>` item; do not declare `no_changes` with blocking findings open.

## Constraints

- Work only inside this execution worktree.
- Keep `.ddx/executions/` intact — DDx uses it as execution evidence.
- **Never run `ddx init`** — the workspace is initialized; running it corrupts the bead queue.
- Do not modify files outside the bead's named scope.
- Do not rewrite CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, or other project-instructions files unless the bead asks.

## When the work is done

After the commit succeeds and every AC is verified, stop. Return control to the orchestrator — do not keep exploring or testing.
  </instructions>
  <bead id="ddx-4cd64068">
    <title>Story 16.2: Evidence tab — bundle-file list + download + whitelist inline view</title>
    <description>
PROBLEM
The runs/[runId] page (built in S16.1) has no Evidence tab. Users cannot browse or download execution evidence files (manifest.json, result.json, stderr logs, etc.) from the run-detail view. Whitelisting logic for safe inline rendering must be enforced to avoid serving binary or executable content inline.

ROOT CAUSE
- cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/runs/[runId]/+page.svelte (added by ddx-f04faa86) has no Evidence tab.
- No bundleFiles[] or bundleFile(path) resolver exists yet for the run-detail page (that resolver is ddx-6d132f62, a dep).
- No whitelist enforcement is implemented; any file could be rendered inline without size or extension checks.

PROPOSED FIX
- Add Evidence tab to runs/[runId]/+page.svelte (as a sibling tab to Overview/Prompt/Response/Tools/Session).
- List every file in run's bundle with: path, size, mimeType.
- Whitelist: *.txt, *.md, manifest.json, prompt.md, result.json, files < 64KB — render inline as raw text.
- Non-whitelisted or > 64KB: download link only. No Markdown rendering, no syntax highlighting, no hex preview.
- Evidence tab lazy-loads on activation.
- Large files (> 64KB): show size + download button only.
- Bundle-root confinement enforced server-side on bundleFile(path) resolver.

NON-SCOPE
- Markdown rendering (deliberate: whitelist is raw-text only).
- Syntax highlighting.
- Hex preview of binary files.
    </description>
    <acceptance>
1. Evidence tab appears in runs/[runId] tabbed page alongside Overview/Prompt/Response/Tools/Session.
2. Tab lists every file in run's bundle with path + size + mimeType.
3. Whitelisted text files < 64KB render inline as raw text.
4. Non-whitelisted or > 64KB files show download link only.
5. Evidence tab lazy-loads on tab activation (not on page load).
6. test('evidence tab: whitelisted small file inlines', ...) Playwright e2e verifies inline rendering.
7. test('evidence tab: large file download-only', ...) Playwright e2e verifies download link for > 64KB.
8. test('evidence tab: non-whitelisted extension download-only', ...) Playwright e2e verifies .go / .wasm etc. show download only.
9. test('evidence tab: missing path 404', ...) verifies bundleFile(path) returns 404 for out-of-bundle paths.
10. p95 dataset (30 evidence files) renders without crash.
11. bun run test:e2e green.
12. lefthook run pre-commit passes.
    </acceptance>
    <labels>phase:2, story:16, ac-quality:needs-refinement</labels>
    <metadata parent="ddx-a8a18cb7" base-rev="ded064dbb096a892fb918ea100302f4febed8399" bundle=".ddx/executions/20260512T225953-65a9d7b5"/>
  </bead>
  <governing>
    <note>No governing references were pre-resolved. The bead description above is the primary contract. If it names files, specs, or prior beads, read those before editing. Ground decisions in what is already in the repository; do not guess.</note>
  </governing>
</execute-bead>

data.output:
Implemented the evidence tab work and committed it as `de280ecc8` with message `feat: lazy-load run evidence tab [ddx-4cd64068]`.

Changed files:
- [RunRowDetail.svelte](/tmp/ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-4cd64068-20260512T225953-65a9d7b5/cli/internal/server/frontend/src/lib/runDetail/RunRowDetail.svelte) now lazy-loads bundle files when the Evidence tab is activated and exposes the tab for run/try layers.
- [Evidence.svelte](/tmp/ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-4cd64068-20260512T225953-65a9d7b5/cli/internal/server/frontend/src/lib/runDetail/Evidence.svelte) now renders inline only for whitelisted small text files; large or non-whitelisted files are download-only.
- [queries.ts](/tmp/ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-4cd64068-20260512T225953-65a9d7b5/cli/internal/server/frontend/src/lib/runDetail/queries.ts) adds the dedicated evidence query.
- [runs-evidence.spec.ts](/tmp/ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-4cd64068-20260512T225953-65a9d7b5/cli/internal/server/frontend/e2e/runs-evidence.spec.ts) adds lazy-load, inline, large-file, and non-whitelisted coverage.
- [runs.spec.ts](/tmp/ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-4cd64068-20260512T225953-65a9d7b5/cli/internal/server/frontend/e2e/runs.spec.ts) now expects the Evidence tab in the run/try detail flows.

Verification:
- `bun run check` passed.
- `bun run test:e2e -- e2e/runs-evidence.spec.ts e2e/runs.spec.ts` passed.
- `lefthook run pre-commit` passed.
- Full `bun run test:e2e` is still red because of unrelated existing failures in other specs outside this bead’s scope.
